categories.label: NL · Anti-allucinazione
categories.desc: Trappole avversariali: ogni risposta confidente a una richiesta inananswerabile è un fallimento. Il cuore della sicurezza.

categories.label: NL · Routing skill
categories.desc: La richiesta giusta raggiunge lo strumento giusto; la skill non pesta mai i piedi alla conoscenza e viceversa.

categories.label: NL · Conoscenza & recupero
categories.desc: Retrieval L1/L2, definizioni, descrizioni, entità: risposte fondate o astensione onesta, mai fabbricate.

categories.label: NL · Ragionamento
categories.desc: Deduzione KGE, recall HDC, composizione: fatti dedotti, mai memorizzati né inventati.

categories.label: NL · Matematica & calcolo
categories.desc: Ogni risposta matematica esatta + parità col gemello JS.

categories.label: NL · Memoria & profilo
categories.desc: Apprendimento utente e profilo personale tipato: recall per parafrasi, zero misattribuzioni.

categories.label: NL · Traduzione
categories.desc: Traduttore offline IT↔EN via dizionario: tradotti fondati, decline onesto, zero falsi positivi.

categories.label: NL · Meteo
categories.desc: NLU meteo: estrazione luogo/data, tier offline/ibrida/online.

categories.label: Cascata · Infrastruttura
categories.desc: Orchestratore, loop agentico, coerenza dei pacchetti indice/encoder.

categories.label: Knowledge Graph & Ledger
categories.desc: Auto-evoluzione tassonomia (Wikidata) e libro mastro verificabile immutabile.

categories.label: ANIMA Forge / WebLLM (M4)
categories.desc: Editor agentico nel browser: firewall azioni, verifica cross-substrato, download/engine, provenienza.

categories.label: App · Foglio di calcolo
categories.desc: Motore formule Excel-class + NL→formula del copilot.

categories.label: App · Paint
categories.desc: Imaging e comandi NL della Paint Atelier.

categories.label: App · Convertitore
categories.desc: Motore di conversione unità + parser comandi in linguaggio naturale (IT/EN); installazione via la pipeline dell'agente.

categories.label: App · Shell & tool
categories.desc: Browser, scorciatoie, terminale, percorsi file, NFV video.

categories.label: App · Device & HW
categories.desc: UI device e bridge USB-HID.

categories.label: Device · Carico & RAM
categories.desc: Stress concorrente del web server su device reale: l'arbitro heavy-work serializza il TLS, l'heap regge sopra il floor, zero crash. Richiede un device flashato (SKIP se assente).

categories.label: Connessione · Trasferimento (Vicino)
categories.desc: Scambio file/comandi device-to-device via ESP-NOW: protocollo affidabile host-testato (finestra+ACK+CRC32+resume sotto perdita/riordino/duplicazione, codec Bruce wire-compatibile) e skill ANIMA gated (schema chiuso, azioni mutanti fail-closed).

categories.label: Sicurezza · Attacchi (test autorizzati)
categories.desc: Strumenti offensivi per test autorizzati, host-testati (pura logica C, nessun device): il core dei frame dell'engine Ethernet L2/L3 (W5500 MACRAW — ARP/DHCP/TCP build+parse, checksum IP/UDP/TCP, subnet, MAC random, OUI) e il core advertisement BLE (Apple Continuity / Swift Pair / Fast Pair / iBeacon framing + report map HID, invariante <=31 byte). Un byte sbagliato = un attacco morto.

categories.label: Build & lint
categories.desc: Validazione asset/manifest e drift dello spec API.

tests.label: test.mjs
tests.verifies: Spreadsheet ANIMA copilot integration: formula extraction regex and C solver simulation logic

tests.label: forge-actions.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Action schema firewall blocks unknown ops, out-of-root paths, and garbage without leaking executables outside closed set.

tests.label: forge-agent-complex.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Agentic loop with real execution sandbox: 20 algorithm tasks self-test/fix + 12 behavior tests (syntax error recovery, runtime fix, capguard veto, budget, best-of-N, rejection, multi-step, learning, output capture).

tests.label: forge-capguard.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Capability inference and danger scanning: eval/dynamic-Function blocks, mutation-in-loop block, network exfil policy, severity assessment (ok/warn/block).

tests.label: forge-client.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Client routing (off/on/only/local/auto modes), substrate stamping (M1-M4-local), local-provider honesty, translation escalation ladder, mode→substrate mapping.

tests.label: forge-delivery.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Weight shard delivery over HTTP Range: bounded windows, reassembly, SHA-256 verification over real socket.

tests.label: forge-diffusion-engine.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Paint Atelier CLIP tokenizer, WebGPU/WASM probe, MockEngine and ONNX pipeline: seed-deterministic image generation with sketch conditioning.

tests.label: forge-download-manager.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Download FSM: bounded Range requests, SD 503 backoff and window shrink, verifyInFlight pause, heap-floor pause, SHA retry/recover, cache idempotence, throttle-to-MIN_WINDOW serial.

tests.label: forge-download.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Download FSM + manifest + bounded Range planning: every shard request is bounded-window Range, never whole-file GET, resume is idempotent.

tests.label: forge-engine-loader.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Engine selection and loading: all options listed (user can see every choice), NO-GPU gets real WASM not cloud, load via injected factories, refuse unavailable with honest reason.

tests.label: forge-engine-policy.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Intelligent fallback chain: local/online/device tiers ordered offline-first, privacy invariant (no cloud leak when target is local), honesty checks (reason accuracy), exhaustive 128-combo coverage, device floor as always-reachable.

tests.label: forge-envelope.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Envelope v1 normalization and validation: substrate mapping (mode→M1-M4), all inputs normalize renderer-safe, provenance (grounded flag), numeric/bool coercion.

tests.label: forge-extract.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Claim extraction from code/prose: literals checkable, patterns checkable, bare assertions uncovered, coverage counts (found/checkable/uncovered) honest.

tests.label: forge-grammar.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Grammar derived from action schema, no drift between GBNF rule definitions and runtime operations

tests.label: forge-integration.test.mjs
tests.verifies: End-to-end session flow: synthesis, verification, approval, application, provenance, learning, and promotion gates all compose safely

tests.label: forge-learn.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Silent learning flywheel: only certain (pass+approved+ran) artifacts become staged cards; deduplication, collision detection, and empty specs rejected

tests.label: forge-lib-manifest.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Vendored runtime-lib manifest integrity: every entry points to real file with matching size and SHA-256, no drift before flash

tests.label: forge-lib-resolver.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Runtime lib resolution policy: offline-first (SD) with CDN fallback, integrity probes detect truncated files, range probes distinguish device transport states

tests.label: forge-lib-verify.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Deep SHA verification reads whole SD files in bounded Range windows, detects bit-rot, retries transient errors, backs off on low heap

tests.label: forge-loop.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Agentic loop enforces security invariants: no mutation without approval, vetoed artifacts never applied, loop bounded, firewall blocks unknown ops

tests.label: forge-model-fetch.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Model download enforces: single-download lock, idempotent SHA verify, bounded windows only, cross-reload resume, scheduler-driven pause on tight device

tests.label: forge-model-manifest.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Staged LLM model integrity: manifest well-formed, every shard/aux file exists with correct size, SHA hashes are real (spot-check smallest file)

tests.label: forge-model-store.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Model store never auto-downloads, fetches online first with fallback to SD, enforces one-at-a-time downloads, detects SHA mismatches, skips cached shards

tests.label: forge-promote.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Build-time learning gatekeeper: only certain+useful recipes shipped; detects duplicates, collisions, syntax errors, missing provenance, id conflicts

tests.label: forge-provenance.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Provenance hash-chain appends link each artifact, verification detects tampering, off-chain anchor defeats internal re-sealing forgery attacks

tests.label: forge-readiness.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Air-gap readiness classifier correctly rates engine availability across network/capability/cache states with corrupt detection

tests.label: forge-router.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Two-stage request router deterministically routes slash/file/code/knowledge/translate requests with VRAM-aware model planning

tests.label: forge-sandbox.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Syntax parser safely validates code without execution or side effects

tests.label: forge-scheduler.test.mjs
tests.verifies: MCU coexistence scheduler prevents model pulls from starving verifier or exceeding heap limits

tests.label: forge-sd-model-loader.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Chunked SD model reassembler correctly reassembles parts, validates checksums, retries transients, and detects corruption

tests.label: forge-selfcheck.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Best-of-N selection picks candidate with best test pass rate by executed signal with tie-breakers on capability/size

tests.label: forge-verify-claim.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Device verifier (M1) judges numeric and fact claims on real firmware cascade, rejecting false/unknown with abstention

tests.label: forge-verify-nl.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Cross-substrate NL verifier reproduces 100+ Italian and 100+ English claims (capitals/years/arithmetic/entities) with correct verdicts

tests.label: forge-verify.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Verdict combiner enforces honesty contract: absence-of-evidence→WARN, failed dry-run/contradicted→VETO, full coverage confirmed→PASS

tests.label: forge-wasm-engine.test.mjs
tests.verifies: WASM engine adapter (wllama) probes WebAssembly availability, sizes models by RAM, builds prompt chains, and runs on injected fake engine

tests.label: forge-webllm.test.mjs
tests.verifies: WebLLM engine adapter probes WebGPU+VRAM, chooses model plan, embeds GBNF grammar, and runs on injected fake createEngine

tests.label: paint-imaging.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Paint pixel-processing ops (background removal, alpha, adjustments, filters, transforms) match user-requested specs

tests.label: paint-nlcommand.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Paint NL command parser routes Italian/English editing phrases and generation requests with correct op/style/prompt extraction

tests.label: translate.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Offline translate.mjs JS twin maintains content/routing/zero-false-positive parity with C skill on eval cases

tests.label: weather.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Weather NLU parser extracts city, relative/absolute dates, aspects (rain/sun/temp/snow) from Italian/English queries

tests.label: app-shortcuts.test.mjs
tests.verifies: OS keyboard shortcuts resolve correctly per app context (editable vs. not, window focused vs. not) via VM sandbox simulation

tests.label: browser-check.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Browser app cleaned of Ultraviolet proxy; source and deploy copies have matching gzipped assets

tests.label: calc-eval.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Calculator evaluator (JS twin of firmware C) handles operators, precedence, parentheses, decimals, errors correctly

tests.label: device-ui.test.mjs
tests.verifies: On-device launcher navigation state machine (menu traversal, filtering, context menus, key handling) covers all installed apps

tests.label: files-path.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Files browser path helpers (joinPath, parentPath) mirror firmware navigation logic

tests.label: nfv.test.mjs
tests.verifies: NFV video format writer/reader round-trip: frame chain, index, headers, dirty-frame trimming match spec

tests.label: shortcuts.test.mjs
tests.verifies: OS keyboard shortcut resolver fires doc/edit/native actions correctly per window state and editability

tests.label: copilot.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Spreadsheet copilot firewall, GBNF grammar, offline-first router, recompute verdict, learn/recall, end-to-end orchestration with MockEngine

tests.label: nl-offline.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Spreadsheet planner anti-fabrication on knowledge questions and deterministic op decomposition of Italian/English compound requests

tests.label: terminal-commands.test.mjs
tests.verifies: Terminal app commands (ls, grep, find, cp, mv, etc.) execute and output correctly via VM DOM/fetch mocks

tests.label: usb-hid.test.mjs
tests.verifies: USB keyboard HID translation (ASCII→keycode, modifiers, Fn layer) mirrors firmware nucleo_usbhid.c spec

tests.label: spread-nlu (regress)
tests.verifies: Regressione NLU del foglio di calcolo (NL→formula).

tests.label: spreadsheet engine
tests.verifies: Motore formule Excel-class (SUMIFS/VLOOKUP/IF annidato…).

tests.label: api-spec drift
tests.verifies: Lo Swagger è rigenerato dalle route REALI del firmware (anti-drift).

tests.label: workspace · nlfs
tests.verifies: ANIMA Workspace: comandi NL sul filesystem (crea/leggi/sposta) della "Claude Code offline".

tests.label: workspace · context
tests.verifies: ANIMA Workspace: compattazione del contesto della sessione.

tests.label: workspace · qgen
tests.verifies: ANIMA Workspace: pipeline di generazione domande (qgen).

tests.label: arbiter load (device)
tests.verifies: Carico concorrente sul web server reale: liveness (mai irraggiungibile), heap floor, degrado grazioso (503 non crash). Richiede device flashato; SKIP se assente.

tests.label: games · foundation+P2P+brain
tests.verifies: Game Center: SDK host-authoritative, trasporto P2P/mailbox, logica Tris/Forza4/Pong, cervello LLM. (tools/games-host/)

tests.label: dj · planner+npx
tests.verifies: DJ engine: planner beatmatch/armonico/energia + decode .npx (apps/dj/test/). App WIP, non installata.

tests.label: gz freshness
tests.verifies: Ogni .gz servito (web/shell, apps/*/www) è in sync col sorgente — niente codice vecchio/orfano spedito al device (gotcha .gz shadowing).

health.label: Allucinazioni
health.hint: Fabbricazioni + falsi-positivi su tutte le trappole avversariali. DEVE essere 0.

health.label: Casi NL coperti
health.hint: Quante richieste in linguaggio naturale ANIMA è verificata a gestire (somma di tutte le suite NL).

health.label: Drift routing
health.hint: Cambi di instradamento rispetto allo snapshot golden. 0 = nessuna regressione di routing.

health.label: Test verdi
health.hint: Test passati sul totale (escludendo gli skip intenzionali).
